project_type: Full-stack portfolio app (Python FastAPI backend + Next.js frontend)
build_system: pip for backend, npm for frontend
test_framework: pytest with anyio for async tests, conftest.py in backend/tests/
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/PORTFOLIO/backend && TESTING=true SECRET_KEY=test-key python -m pytest tests/ -v
verification_instructions: 1. Run backend tests with pytest. 2. Run frontend build with npm run build.
environment_constraints: Full internet access. HF_API_TOKEN may not be available in test environment so chatbot tests use fallback mode.
key_patterns: Backend uses FastAPI routers in routers/, services in services/. Chatbot pipeline: user query -> vector_store.query() -> _clean_context_for_llm() -> _build_prompt() -> _call_hf_api() -> _clean_response(). Off-topic detection via _is_off_topic(). Fallback responses via _generate_fallback_response() when no HF token.
directory_structure: backend/ contains FastAPI app. backend/services/chatbot.py is the main file to fix. backend/services/vector_store.py handles RAG retrieval. backend/routers/admin.py has the smoke-test endpoint. backend/tests/ has existing tests.
